title: SimpleChunks
description: An easy-to-use chunkloader with a modern GUI, teleport system, and secure permission management — ideal for farms, redstone, and automated systems.
body:
## **📌 Description**
SimpleChunks is a lightweight and GUI-based chunkloader plugin.
Players can keep selected areas of the world active — even while offline — ideal for farms, redstone systems and automation.

Everything is controlled through a clean and intuitive inventory menu with player heads, teleportation, search function and pagination.
No complicated commands or configuration.

## **🔧 Features**
- GUI chunk management
- Custom names for each chunkloader
- Teleport to chunkloaders
- Particle preview of loaded chunks
- Search & page navigation
- Auto-saving across restarts
- Permission system (players manage only their own)
- Optional admin mode
- Optimized performance
- Language support: German & English

## **🔐 Permissions**
| Permission              | Effect                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `simplechunks.use`      | Open GUI & create chunkloaders |
| `simplechunks.teleport` | Teleport to own chunkloaders   |
| `simplechunks.delete`   | Delete own chunkloaders        |
| `simplechunks.admin`    | Manage all chunkloaders        |

## **⭐ Why SimpleChunks?**
Fast to install · easy to use · safe for survival automation.
No setup required — just install, open the menu and start loading chunks.
